subcodes.first_line: My Lord, my Lord! On earth, I make mention of Thy name; at sea, I laud Thy virtues; upon the lofty mountain, I call out to Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی ربی فی البر اذکرک و فی البحر اسبحک و علی الجبال انادیک و علی الاتلال اسجد
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God
